datasets.name: 096da292
fcb587fb
queryLines:
SELECT
  c.category,
  SUM(f.sales_amount) AS sales_amount
FROM
  workspace.salesdb.dim_products c
    LEFT JOIN workspace.salesdb.fact_sales f
      ON c.product_key = f.product_key
GROUP BY
  c.category
ORDER BY
  SUM(f.sales_amount) DESC
